posters.title: Review Ui
posters.description: Checklist app for users to track their daily tasks.
objectives: Task 1: Design interactive product selection filters
Task 2: Optimize visual hierarchy on mobile viewport details
Task 3: Map user payment entry field interactions
posters.author: Easy

posters.title: Food Delivery Tracker Mobile App
posters.description: Design a real-time order tracking map view and driver notification drawer for a local food delivery app. Focus on custom map markers and slide-up modal gestures.
objectives: Task 1: Design tracking map layout and markers
Task 2: Build driver bio card and delivery ETA badge
Task 3: Map real-time chat bubble overlay interactions
posters.author: Intermediate
